Traditional Chinese Medicine & Contemporary Therapies: 

Prescribed with Expert Personal Care

Doctor Adrian incorporates the five major, traditional modalities of Chinese Medicine and has developed each of them to the highest standards; Acupuncture, Herbal Medicine, Massage and Physical Therapy, Chinese Dietary Nutrition Therapy and Exercise Prescription.

Traditional Treatments

Five powerful methods that can directly influence your body’s physiology effectively addressing many conditions to bring about health in mind, body and spirit.​

​

Women’s Health

We use Acupuncture and natural supplements to influence and support women's fertility, menstrual and hormonal health.

Restorative Therapies

To restore your natural state of health and function by eliminating causes for illness internally and externally bringing a healthy flow to be in the best shape you can. ​

Preventative Care

Acupuncture, Physical Therapy & Herbal Medicine modalities designed to make you feel great and support your health, well-being and fitness goals.
